name: Goliath
summary: The first goliaths lived on the highest mountain peaks — far above the tree line, where the air is thin and frigid winds howl. Distantly related to giants and infused with the supernatural essence of their ancestors’ mountainous home, goliaths stand between 7 and 8 feet tall and have a wide array of skin tones resembling different types of stone.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: Your character can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character. ThePlayer’s Handbookoffers a list of languages to choose from. The DM is free to modify that list for a campaign.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Your Strength score increases by 2, and your Constitution score increases by 1.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Goliaths are between 7 and 8 feet tall and weigh between 280 and 340 pounds. Your size is Medium.

coreBonuses: Ability Score Increase.When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.

Languages.Your character can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character. ThePlayer’s Handbookoffers a list of languages to choose from. The DM is free to modify that list for a campaign.
Ability Score Increase.Your Strength score increases by 2, and your Constitution score increases by 1.
Size.Goliaths are between 7 and 8 feet tall and weigh between 280 and 340 pounds. Your size is Medium.
Speed.Your base walking speed is 30 feet.
Languages.You can speak, read, and write Common and Giant.

coreTraits.name: Little Giant
coreTraits.summary: You have proficiency in the Athletics skill, and you count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

coreTraits.name: Mountain Born
coreTraits.summary: You have resistance to cold damage. You also naturally acclimate to high altitudes, even if you’ve never been to one. This includes elevations above 20,000 feet.

coreTraits.name: Stone's Endurance
coreTraits.summary: You can supernaturally draw on unyielding stone to shrug off harm. When you take damage, you can use your reaction to roll a d12. Add your Constitution modifier to the number rolled and reduce the damage by that total. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

coreTraits.name: Age
coreTraits.summary: Goliaths have lifespans comparable to humans. They enter adulthood in their late teens and usually live less than a century.

coreTraits.name: Alignment
coreTraits.summary: Goliath society, with its clear roles and tasks, has a strong lawful bent. The goliath sense of fairness, balanced with an emphasis on self-sufficiency and personal accountability, pushes them toward neutrality.

coreTraits.name: Natural Athlete
coreTraits.summary: You have proficiency in the Athletics skill.

coreTraits.name: Stone's Endurance
coreTraits.summary: You can focus yourself to occasionally shrug off injury. When you take damage, you can use your reaction to roll a d12. Add your Constitution modifier to the number rolled, and reduce the damage by that total. After you use this trait, you can’t use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

coreTraits.name: Powerful Build
coreTraits.summary: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

coreTraits.name: Mountain Born
coreTraits.summary: You have resistance to cold damage. You’re also acclimated to high altitude, including elevations above 20,000 feet.
